Panini · Lunch
Caprese Panini
Fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, baby spinach and basil pesto on toasted artisan bread
VGN
FJD$30
Price
1×
Portions
5 min
Prep
4 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Bread
Artisan bread rolleach1
Filling
Fresh mozzarella, slicedg80
Vine-ripened tomato, slicedg70
Baby spinachg20
Sauce
Basil pestog25
Method
1
Slice bread roll horizontally. Spread pesto on both inner faces.
2
Layer spinach, tomato slices, and mozzarella.
3
Close roll. Press in panini grill 3–4 min at medium heat until golden and cheese melts.
4
Cut on diagonal. Plate with fries.
Plating Notes
Cut on diagonal, cheese pull visible. Fries alongside.
Equipment
Panini press · Bread knife
Allergens
